items.title_en: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
items.title_zh: 中国从美国挖走更多人工智能人才，着眼下一个“超级应用”
items.desc_en: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 从 OpenAI 加入腾讯的首席人工智能科学家姚舜宇周五表示，他的目标是追求通用人工智能。

items.title_en: India's cenbank cuts growth outlook, raises inflation forecast as it keeps rates steady at 5.25%
items.title_zh: 印度中央银行下调增长预期，上调通胀预期，维持利率稳定在 5.25%
items.desc_en: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.
items.desc_zh: 印度储备银行将截至 2027 年 3 月的全年通胀预测上调 50 个基点至 5.1%，同时将全年增长预测从 6.9% 下调至 6.6%。

items.title_en: China's Xi Jinping to make rare visit to North Korea
items.title_zh: 中国习近平罕见访问朝鲜
items.desc_en: Xi will be in North Korea from 8-9 June, a rare visit to the isolated regime that is a longstanding ally of Beijing.
items.desc_zh: 习近平将于 6 月 8 日至 9 日访问朝鲜，这是对作为北京长期盟友的孤立政权的一次罕见访问。

items.desc_en: Demonstrators say the project backed by Donald Trump's son-in-law would harm a protected environment.
items.desc_zh: 示威者表示，唐纳德·特朗普女婿支持的项目将损害受保护的环境。

items.title_en: Oscar-nominated Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies aged 56
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡提名波斯波利斯作家玛嘉·莎塔碧去世，享年 56 岁
items.desc_en: The French-Iranian author and illustrator was known for her graphic novel series and Oscar-nominated film.
items.desc_zh: 这位法裔伊朗作家和插画家以其图画小说系列和奥斯卡提名电影而闻名。

items.title_en: Bluesky was launched as a Twitter rival — but it's far less popular. Now it's eyeing Reddit for inspiration
items.title_zh: Bluesky 是作为 Twitter 的竞争对手推出的，但它的受欢迎程度要​​低得多。现在它正在从 Reddit 上寻找灵感
items.desc_en: "I think the public square is not the direction we want to go in...we're very inspired by companies like Reddit," Bluesky's Rose Wang told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: Bluesky 的 Rose Wang 告诉 CNBC：“我认为公共领域不是我们想要的方向……我们受到 Reddit 这样的公司的启发。”

items.title_en: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
items.title_zh: 医务人员称，以色列空袭造成加沙城 11 人死亡
items.desc_en: Women and children were among those killed when Israeli aircraft struck at least four residential buildings in several areas.
items.desc_zh: 以色列飞机袭击了几个地区的至少四栋住宅楼，造成妇女和儿童死亡。

items.title_en: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
items.title_zh: 考试监管机构警告高科技作弊现象增多
items.desc_en: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.
items.desc_zh: Ofqual 负责人表示，监考人员正在接受培训，以检测智能眼镜和隐藏式耳机等设备。

items.title_en: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
items.title_zh: 印度火爆的“蟑螂”派对拥有数百万追随者。投资者需要了解什么
items.desc_en: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 印度一个由 Z 世代领导、以社交媒体为先的模拟政党已聚集了数百万追随者，并将于周六举行现场抗议。

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界上最富有的人，他利用自己的平台在广泛的话题上表达了自己的观点。

items.title_en: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
items.title_zh: “购买已经过时的东西”：生物技术并购有望创下新冠疫情爆发前以来最好的一年
items.desc_en: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.
items.desc_zh: 在迫在眉睫的专利悬崖、新近活跃的公开市场以及大型制药公司竞相加强其产品线的推动下，2026 年的交易将迎来一个良好的开端。

items.title_en: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
items.title_zh: 研究称火车上的电话信号大多数时候都不够好
items.desc_en: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。

items.title_en: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.title_zh: 英国的出版商可以选择退出 Google AI 搜索结果
items.desc_en: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.desc_zh: 竞争与市场管理局表示，这将使出版商“在与谷歌谈判内容交易时处于更有利的地位”。

items.title_en: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
items.title_zh: 您是否发现自己漫无目的地滚动？你并不孤单
items.desc_en: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.
items.desc_zh: Virgin Media O2 的一份报告显示，平均 36% 的人花在手机上的时间没有明确的目的。

items.title_en: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers
items.title_zh: 微软测试针对上班族的可穿戴人工智能设备
items.desc_en: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，其员工正在测试“可穿戴访问徽章”和桌面设备。

items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_en: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.desc_en: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。
